title: 2 Square
desc: Nikhil comes early after work, and his wife runs to the bedroom where a man is hiding under the bed. She tries to indulge in small talks with Nikhil only to distract him so that her boyfriend can run away. What happens at the end is hilarious.

title: Ruk Jana Nahi
desc: Rinku, a 28-year-old man living with his father, has lost his will to live. However, a wedding in his neighbourhood brings a constant stream of visitors who unknowingly delay his plans and ultimately restore his will to live and succeed.

title: Anu Aur Di
desc: Late at night, an angry girl had a fight with her boyfriend and called her sister. She had a big suitcase when her sister picked her up in the car. During the drive, they argued and brought up old problems. Things got worse, and the older sister pushed the younger one against the car window in anger. Their argument stopped suddenly when police lights flashed in the dark, and officers pulled them over. The air was tense with anticipation. What would come to light during this unexpected encounter with the police?

title: Annie
desc: Annie, who had recently experienced the loss of her unborn child, crosses paths with an enigmatic homeless man one evening. Unbeknownst to her, that meeting was on the brink of altering her life permanently.

title: 13Th Portal
desc: Everyone in the city wants to touch the sky we have to keep running. There is no time to relax, one has to move on or get mowed down. 13th portal talks about a city like that. A city that’s brutal in its ideologies yet accommodates all. The most popular phrase of the people here is, if you come on board we will adjust.

title: Happily Married Part 2
desc: Rani & Animesh, a couple who is having an affair with Jimmy plan to meet him on Saturday. The story unfolds as their meeting with Jimmy doesn’t go as planned.

title: Half Cake
desc: HALF CAKE is about a single mother who struggles to earn extra wages to fulfil an innocent ask of a cake from her only son. Beyond the cake, it's a tale of innocence and resilience that will touch your heart.

title: Just Take It Easy
desc: The story is basically on internal happiness. Sanjay a businessman is the CEO of Oberoi Industries. He is not happy in his life. Despite having all the materialistic pleasure not happy internally. The company celebrates its success party on its high growth. Sanjay invites a model Priyanka, his girlfriend to the party. He promises her to make the face of Oberoi Industries.

title: Funkaar
desc: A heart-warming tale of a mother who rediscovers her passion for her craft when her daughter pushes her beyond the confines of her daily routine.

title: Jama Punji
desc: A late night conversation between a mother (Sarla) & her son Anshuman, 13 days after the passing of his father where they discuss the reasons for his detachment with his father and how by the end of the night, certain events lead Anshuman to accept and make amends with his deceased father.

title: Harela
desc: A 60-year-old woman and a young man navigate tradition and modernity during the festival in Uttarakhand. Who will uphold their heritage in an evolving world?

title: Harmless
desc: A boy down on his luck. A girl looking for thrills. A plot is hatched. A kidnapping is staged. As far as crimes go, this one seems harmless. But, as with all things, there is a price to pay. A hefty price. Harmless begins as a crime-thriller and develops into a dramatic adventure with a little bit of romance thrown in.

title: Hack-her
desc: Shraddha, about to leave for America through a Corporate that is currently under attack by a hacker, who is on run by the police and is currently on every news channel. Between all this is Vishesh, who truly loves Shraddha, and now even she is going, just like his parents, leaving him all alone. But not everything we see is true, a hacker on a mission, a girl with ambitions, and a lover, sounds good right? But who is who? Do we know the entire truth? Find out everything in our upcoming short film "Hack-Her"

title: Ketaki
desc: At dusk in Mumbai, 22-year-old Ava hoped for a moment with her neighbor Harry, who hurried past, preoccupied. At home, Harry revealed stolen cash from a bank robbery. When Aaron demanded the money at gunpoint, Harry shot him dead. Hearing the shots, Ava discovered the scene and, confessing her love for Harry, chose to stay. They buried Aaron, symbolizing a new beginning. As they prepared to flee, Ava's past caught up with them, leading to another gunshot as they escaped, with the haunting "Behri Duniya" playing on.

title: Green Screen
desc: One day he find something and with the help of his friend, try to fulfill his dream. But, fate has a different game. The world of the 'Haves' and their desire for the little things in lives that eludes them and the desires invoked by Screen, which teaches us to salivate over things we never knew, otherwise existed. Sometimes small things matter the most.

title: Housewarming
desc: A short film signifying how the energies we invite into our house affect us.

title: Harshit
desc: This film is inspired by Shakespeare's Hamlet, written by Dhruva Harsh. It contains all the Shakespearean elements like, betrayal, love, hatred, revenge, sexual jealousy, poetic justice and dilemma of existence. Harshit is a protagonist synonymous to Hamlet, a Hindu boy living in a Muslim dominated area in Mumbai, India, loves Rahila, his neighbour. Later on fate plays a game in which two innocents, Harshit n Rahila are trapped.

title: Pravaah The Flow
desc: This story is about this Nature photographer Shivoham. Through his travel, he likes to explore and capture wonderful, breath taking creations of nature and places. But how can a journey be complete, without interesting escapades? 5 different locations, 5 different interactions revealing the darkest secrets, depth of life, deep hidden emotions and finally, ending the journey with an experience that leaves him all rejuvenated…as if he had a new birth and gets him all set for the next one.

title: Gutargu
desc: Gutargu is a romantic Hindi short story about a guy a girl who admire each other, and are falling for each other secretly. Their unusual love story takes place on a rooftop. Will their love story have a happy ending?

title: Horror Chapters
desc: Many horror events, interaction with super natural possibilities. Exploring the Paranormal

title: Kamera
desc: He is a 12 years old boy, who works in a garbage dump and lives in the slum along with his mother. Both have different ideologies towards life. He is a staunch believer of being positive and has a dream of spreading smiles. But, his mother is a frustrated woman. While working, he finds a digital camera in the dump. His friend tells him that people smile whenever you point it towards them. He soon realizes the same and gets all thrilled to spread smiles including his mother. Unfortunately, the camera gets lost and all his dreams get shattered. What happens next is the core of the film. The story revolves around the perception of a small kid who wants to follow his dreams.

title: Hearts Awash In Sapphire Light
desc: Hearts Awash in Sapphire Light unfolds the tale of two individuals who encounter each other one evening, initially under less-than-ideal circumstances. At first, they engage in petty arguments over trivial matters. However, as time passes, the undeniable power of their connection becomes evident, serving as a poignant reminder that sometimes, the most extraordinary journeys take place within the depths of our own hearts.

title: Holding Back
desc: Short Film Holding back a short film is based on a true incident in 1999, of Shiva, a young man suffering from blood cancer and who, unfortunately, passed away during the journey while traveling by train from Bangalore to Chennai, for a friend’s marriage. Shiva was traveling with his mom and elder cousin Suresh. This film deals with the mother’s emotional journey of her son’s death. The pivotal character- Mother, is played by the national award winner Seema Biswas, popularly known for her role in and as the Bandit Queen; while Father is played by national award-winning director-writer Ananth Mahadevan; Coolie is played by Aditya Lakhia (Kachra) of Lagaan fame; Cousin brother is played by Raj Arjun, main lead in Shabri and Kaalo, Shiva, the son is played by Kunal Kumar with supporting roles played by Marathi theatre and film veterans, Pradeep Patwardhan and Jaywanth Wadekar. Background score is to be given by Anurag Saikia, the national award winner for the music of Yugadrashta in 2014. The camerawork is done by Pushpank Gawade who won the best award for Cinematography for the film Kaalo in South Africa film festival 2012.

title: Hum Types
desc: Charu, a girl from high society, faces her own struggles. One night, she meets Makrand, a boy from a low social class. Initially, their class difference creates a barrier, but as they spend time together, Charu realizes they share more similarities than differences. Through moments of vulnerability and connection, they discover their common humanity.

title: Girgit
desc: The film is an adaptation of Anton Chekhov's short story Chameleon. It tells a cheeky tale of injustice and corruption exposing the insincerity of public officials and selfish interests that aggravate or subdue their actions.

title: Kajal
desc: Like all elements, humans have a saturation point. What happens when a woman a constantly bullied by her boss, harassed by strangers and abused by her husband finds an abandoned package one night? A package that holds an answer to all her demons. A package that triggers an inner change in her the moment that she lays eyes on it. Kohl captures a turning point in the life of a woman, in a world claimed by men.
